_doc: Single source of truth for Python (tools/v4/modules/m9_filter_shield/) and TS (src/lib/filter-shield.ts). Empirically calibrated on n=6525 v2-OOT matches. See diagnostic JSON for full per-config Brier-lift table.

csd_veto._signal_rationale: Empirically beats residuals (goals - xG) on Brier-lift. Hypothesis residuals would isolate process-change failed: residuals signal has CI crossing 0 for all configs.

catastrophic._empirical: n=2173, Brier lift +0.0203, CI [+0.0053, +0.0343] — below +0.030 gate but large-N and CI > 0
catastrophic._status: SHADOW_LOG_ONLY until 200-firing burn-in confirms in production

travel_fatigue_veto.rationale: Stadium-coverage gap (62 percent MNAR) confounds signal with league-tier. Detected-fatigue-state has NEGATIVE Brier lift (-0.063) — model performs BETTER on these matches because they are Tier-A leagues with better data. Would have applied haircut to systematically better predictions.

per_league_isotonic_calibration.rationale: Walk-forward 5-fold CV: all 3 target leagues fail acceptance gate. EPL closest (Brier-delta -0.003 with CI [-0.005, +0.0002], ECE +14.2 pct) — needs multi-season window to clear -0.005 gate. La_liga2 and primeira_liga: per-league iso DEGRADES (ECE -6.4 pct and -1.1 pct). Conformal-coverage drift does not translate to Brier-improvability via isotonic. Deferred to backlog after 22/23+23/24 OOT v2-predictions backfill.
